description: This image is a screenshot of a user interface section titled "Additional Documents". It displays a rectangular dashed-line box labeled "Drag and Drop" in the center, with "OR" below it. Underneath "OR", there is a green-outlined button with a green upward arrow icon and the text "UPLOAD DOCUMENT/S". Below the dashed box, explanatory grey text reads: "All documents that help to understand the content. (No file type restrictions)". This interface provides two methods for users to add supplementary files to a system entry, likely within a Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data extraction or management process.
